fields.name: currency
fields.description: Defines a monetary unit. It is a three alpha code (iata code). Example: EUR for Euros, USD for US dollar, etc.

fields.name: code
fields.description: International Standards Organization (ISO) Tax code.It is a two-letter country code.

fields.name: percentage
fields.description: In the case of a tax on TST value, the percentage of the tax will be indicated in this field.

fields.name: included
fields.description: Indicates if tax is included or not

fields.name: pricingFrequency
fields.description:
Specifies if the tax applies per stay or per night
  - PER_STAY
  - PER_NIGHT

fields.name: pricingMode
fields.description:
Specifies if the tax applies per occupant or per room
  - PER_OCCUPANT
  - PER_PRODUCT
